workUnits.title: Define refresh-token rotation contracts
workUnits.intent: Define contracts for preserving token-family identity, returning replacement tokens, and rejecting replayed tokens without affecting password-reset behavior.

workUnits.title: Implement refresh-token rotation in the GraphReFly flow
workUnits.intent: After each successful refresh, preserve the token-family ID, invalidate the previous token, and persist its replacement without changing password-reset behavior.

blueprintClaims.statement: Under session-writes.v1, the online session mutation may directly persist the replacement refresh token and invalidate its predecessor.

workUnits.title: Expose refresh-token rotation through the HTTP adapter
workUnits.intent: Return the replacement refresh token after a successful request and reject replay of the preceding token.

blueprintClaims.statement: The HTTP adapter depends on the accepted U2 refresh-rotation runtime.
